visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue beret and a dark blue off-shoulder top, stands in a brightly lit retail environment with refrigerated glass shelves in the background. She holds a large, circular clear plastic container of seafood pasta and smiles broadly at the camera. The setting is clean with bright white lighting reflecting off the glass surfaces. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the product label on the container, followed by a sequence in a kitchen. Hands are shown using metal tongs to transfer long, thin noodles from a stainless steel bowl onto a black plastic tray sitting on a white digital scale. The scale's screen displays numerical changes as weight is added. (3) On a white kitchen counter, a hand pours a small container of yellow sauce and chopped red chilies into a stainless steel frying pan on a black induction stove. Sliced garlic and seafood pieces including squid and clams are added and stirred. Subsequently, the noodles are poured in, and a tall silver pepper grinder is used to season the dish. (4) A close-up shot displays the finished plate of pasta with prominent shrimp and clams. The final scene shows the main character and another woman wearing a striped bucket hat sitting together at a table. They use forks to eat the pasta while looking at the camera, using hand gestures to emphasize their points. The background features a domestic living space with various plush toys and household items.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 你敢信好市多居然有賣. (2) [Slogan]: 455元值得? [Variety]: 香蒜海鮮義大利麵. (3) [Subtitle]: 回去加熱看看. (4) [Subtitle]: 哇給超多料. (5) [Subtitle]: 因為我們現在看麵很多所以決定來單獨秤一下麵有多重. (6) [Subtitle]: 麵單獨就有400多克. (7) [Subtitle]: 到進香蒜醬. (8) [Subtitle]: 香蒜醬給的很誠意. (9) [Subtitle]: 說明書上寫說加海鮮去炒. (10) [Subtitle]: 我們通常應該會先炒麵再炒海鮮. (11) [Subtitle]: 可是他想要海鮮先下去炒. (12) [Subtitle]: 下麵時間. (13) [Subtitle]: 好香喔. (14) [Subtitle]: 加一點胡椒. (15) [Subtitle]: 鹽巴. (16) [Variety]: 有妹妹真好!. (17) [Subtitle]: 半份海鮮麵完成. (18) [Variety]: 好廚師阿頭上菜囉. (19) [Variety]: 香蒜海鮮義大利麵. (20) [Subtitle]: 我們給出的評分是各位看到可以路過. (21) [Subtitle]: 因為整體來說沒什麼特別的. (22) [Subtitle]: 一大盤呢賣你480多塊500塊給了你一些蝦子一些蛤蜊. (23) [Subtitle]: 然後老實說都沒什麼特別厲害或特別香甜的味道出來. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後蛤蜊呢肉好小普普通通. (25) [Subtitle]: 就是肉既不大也不鮮美. (26) [Subtitle]: 主要是他給的那個算是唯一算是調味的蒜頭油呢他的蒜沒有什麼蒜香味. (27) [Subtitle]: 也沒有說整個大蒜味浸滿了整個麵炒在一起沒有. (28) [Subtitle]: 還有麵體我覺得也不及格. (29) [Subtitle]: 整體都是普普通通浪費這500塊我覺得你們可以路過. (30) [Subtitle]: 好可惜.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator and 1 female companion appearing during the review section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a navy blue beret and a dark blue off-shoulder ruffle top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A supermarket refrigerated aisle with price tags and meal packs, a modern indoor kitchen with induction cooktop and stainless steel cookware, and a domestic living area with a sofa and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched female voice opens with an excited, high-arousal tone at a fast speech rate. Underneath, a mid-tempo electronic pop track with a synthesized melody and steady electronic drum beat plays at a moderate volume. The acoustic environment is clean with minimal indoor room tone. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition. The speaker continues in a narrative style as the sound of metal tongs clinking against a bowl is clearly audible. The background music maintains its upbeat tempo. (3) Intense sizzling sounds of food frying in a pan dominate the mix, along with the rhythmic scraping of metal against metal. A mechanical clicking sound of a hand-held grinder occurs twice as the narrator provides a step-by-step description of the cooking process. (4) A comic 'boing' sound effect marks the entrance of a second female voice. The two voices engage in a rapid-fire conversational review. The sound of forks scraping against ceramic plates is occasionally heard. The tone of the voices shifts from upbeat to slightly critical, while the background music persists until the final second.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest review of a specific pre-packaged seafood pasta product from Costco, detailing the purchasing experience, the actual content weight, the cooking process, and a final taste evaluation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While the video features a specific brand, the final review is critical and advises viewers to 'pass' on the product, suggesting it is an independent review rather than a paid endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing styles with high text density and sound effects to maintain engagement during a detailed product analysis.
